clip.title: ブレインストーム・ループ

metadata.tags: Bright, mid-tempo minimal electronica with soft synth arpeggios, gentle sidechained pads, and a cushioned kick-snare groove; energy builds in subtle layers then resolves back to a simple loop, ideal for focus. Male or female vocals optional as distant chopped phrases, kept airy and low in the mix so the beat stays unobtrusive.
metadata.gpt_description_prompt:
ブレインストーミング用のインスト曲、
前向きで軽快な電子音楽、
シンセアルペジオと心地よいビート、
思考を邪魔しないミニマルな構成、
アイデアがどんどん出てくる雰囲気

metadata.tags: funk, Clean, futuristic electronica at mid-tempo; light, glassy synth arps cycling steadily over a tight, muted kick and soft snare. Subtle sidechained pads swell and breathe, while a warm, round bass anchors the groove. Occasional filtered risers and delay-splashed plucks mark section changes. Arrangement stays minimal and focused, adding and subtracting layers to keep energy gently rising, ideal for long creative focus bursts., steady, minimal, electronic, light, uplifting
metadata.gpt_description_prompt:
Energetic instrumental background music for brainstorming,
uplifting electronic groove, light synth arpeggios, minimal melody,
steady mid-tempo beat, optimistic and futuristic atmosphere,
no vocals, perfect for creative thinking and innovation sessions

metadata.tags: funk, Glossy modern electro-pop groove with warm evolving synth pads, sidechained plucks, and a steady, forward-driving kick. Start with a filtered, pulsing arpeggio, then bloom into full-spectrum chords and a melodic lead that feels curious and optimistic. Mid-song, strip to bass and claps for a tight build, then reintroduce wide pads and bright top-line for a payoff that feels like ideas snapping into place. Light percussive details and subtle risers keep energy high yet focused—perfect for looping during intense brainstorming sprints., motivating, warm, pop, electronic, inspiring
metadata.gpt_description_prompt:
Upbeat instrumental for startup brainstorming session,
modern electronic pop groove, warm synth pads,
motivating rhythm, creative and optimistic mood,
no vocals, inspiring innovation and fast ideas

metadata.tags: funk, Bubbly electro-funk bed built on a rubbery synth bass and crisp, lightly swung percussion; bright plucky leads trade short call-and-response motifs over warm chord pads. Occasional filtered risers and ear-candy arps keep the energy moving in waves while the overall mix stays clean and mid-focused, perfect under conversation and rapid-fire ideas., playful, light, electronic, funky, bright
metadata.gpt_description_prompt:
Playful instrumental for creative brainstorming,
funky electronic groove, bright synth melodies,
light percussion, energetic but not distracting,
no vocals, sparks imagination and collaboration

metadata.tags: Clean, mid-tempo electronic score with crisp kicks, tight snares, and subtly side-chained bass. Shimmering poly-synth arps weave in stereo, framed by warm pads and bell-like plucks that rise in evolving patterns. Arrangement builds in thoughtful waves—eight-bar motif layers, gentle filter sweeps, and bright chord lifts—maintaining focus and calm momentum. Occasional glitchy percussion accents hint at curiosity and discovery, while the harmonic bed stays optimistic and sophisticated, ideal for deep hackathon brainstorming and breakthrough moments., beats, inspiring, soundtrack, clean, electronic, steady, uplifting
metadata.gpt_description_prompt:
Futuristic instrumental soundtrack for hackathon brainstorming,
clean electronic beats, shimmering synth textures,
uplifting and intelligent atmosphere,
steady tempo, no vocals, inspiring innovative ideas

metadata.tags: funk, Minimal techno bed built on gentle pulsing synths and a soft, steady kick. Evolving high-pass patterns and muted stabs drift in and out, creating a hypnotic groove that stays spacious for deep focus and coding. Subtle filter sweeps and delay tails add motion while keeping the spectrum clean for long creative sessions., steady, gentle, minimal techno, hypnotic, deep
metadata.gpt_description_prompt:
Deep focus instrumental music for creative brainstorming,
minimal techno style, gentle pulsing synths,
steady rhythm, hypnotic groove, no vocals,
designed for thinking, coding, and idea generation
